title: BLOSTM 5" Wallpaper Scraper - Long Handle Heavy Duty Scraper Tool with 5 Inch Wide Head & Soft Grip, Tile Scraper Removes Wallpaper, Vinyl Flooring, Tiles, Paint & More - Includes 3 Spare Blades
features: PROFESSIONAL WALLPAPER SCRAPER - Every homeowner, tradesman and DIY enthusiast needs a high quality tile scraper and wallpaper stripper tool. With its wide head design and soft grip handle, you’ll be able to effectively and efficiently remove wall paper with ease.

MULTIPURPOSE FLOOR SCRAPING TOOL - Whether you’re removing wallpaper, vinyl, tiles, paint, stickers or for use as a glue or paint scraper, this sturdy scraper tool is up for the task! Purchase today to get started on your next project.

WIDE HEAD WALLPAPER STRIPPER - Each wallpaper remover tool features a sizeable 5 inch head for maximum coverage and utility. This heavy duty wall paper scraper tool is a must-have for house projects and cleaning.
ERGONOMIC ENDURANCE SCRAPER - Superior to other wallpaper scrapers, this premium stripping tool is oversized and angled to help you scrape off stubborn residue without damaging surfaces.
INCLUDES 3 SPARE BLADES - This wallpaper scraper tool is designed with a secure attachment for safety. Plus, there are 3 spare blades and a quick change tool conveniently stored in the handle.
description: Product Description Multipurpose Whether you’re removing wallpaper, vinyl, tiles, paint, stickers, or glue, this sturdy scraper tool is up for the task! 3 Spare Blades You will find 3 spare blades and a quick change tool conveniently stored in the handle. There is also a safety attachment included. Wide Head With its wide head of 5 inches and soft grip handle, you’ll be able to effectively and efficiently remove wall paper with ease. BLOSTM 5" Wallpaper Scraper This sturdy wallpaper scraper is your must-have tool for DIY projects and cleaning. With a 5-inch wide head and angled design that allows you to scrape without damaging surfaces, this handy tool is perfect for removing wallpaper, vinyl, tiles, paint, stickers, and glue. It’s highly efficient and effective with a secure attachment system, plus 3 spares & a quick change tool stored in the handle.
